matchingDescription: UK stocks and shares ISA, investment platform, SIPP, flat-fee pricing

variants.text: Open an award-winning Stocks and Shares ISA with interactive investor — start investing tax-efficiently. Capital at risk; tax rules may change.
interactive investor charges a flat monthly fee rather than a percentage — for larger portfolios this can mean significantly lower costs over time.
Consolidate old pensions into a SIPP with interactive investor and manage your retirement investments alongside your ISA in one place.
For investors building a long-term portfolio, interactive investor's award-winning ISA gives access to thousands of UK and global investments.
interactive investor's Stocks and Shares ISA offers research tools and a wide investment range suited to hands-on, experienced investors.

A £100,000 ISA on a 0.25% annual fee platform costs £250 per year; the same portfolio on Interactive Investor's flat £9.99 monthly plan costs £120 — a saving of £130 annually that compounds over time.

Over 20 years, the difference between a 0.45% platform fee and a flat monthly fee can exceed £15,000 on a £100,000 portfolio. Interactive Investor charges a flat £9.99 per month regardless of portfolio size.
